title: Heichal HaTarbut
body: Heichal HaTarbut (Hebrew: היכל התרבות, lit. 'the hall of culture'), officially known as the Charles Bronfman Auditorium and until 2013 as the Fredric R. Mann Auditorium, is the largest concert hall in Tel Aviv, Israel, and home to the Israel Philharmonic Orchestra.
categories: Articles needing additional references from March 2020
